# Luiz Carlos da Silva Junior

> XR Engineer with 10+ years of experience architecting real-time 3D systems in Unity for industrial, medical, and training applications. Founder and CTO of FormulaXR.

## Links

- [Full content for LLMs](https://luizcarlosfx.github.io/llms-full.txt): Complete portfolio content in plain text
- [Website](https://luizcarlosfx.github.io): Portfolio website
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/luizcarlosxr/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/luizcarlosfx)
- [XRProj](https://www.xrproj.com): Multi-platform XR content creation system
- [XRTracker](https://xrtracker.net): Markerless 6DOF object tracking SDK for Unity
- [FormulaXR](https://formulaxr.com): Educational XR platform
